request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom and a patriot, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks remind us why we need proactive measures. Some say we're sacrificing liberties, but look at the facts: targeted surveillance has stopped 3 major threats in the last year alone. Our allies are increasing their security powers too - we can't afford to fall behind. It's about being smart, not about giving up our values. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
